mapper.select: select o.order_no, o.member_no, m.member_id as memberId, nvl(m.member_nickname, m.member_id) as memberNickname, o.bread_no, b.bread_name as breadName, o.order_count, o.total_price, o.order_status, o.order_date from order_tbl o join member_tbl m on o.member_no = m.member_no join bread_tbl b on o.bread_no = b.bread_no where o.order_status = 'PAID' order by o.order_date desc

select o.order_no, o.member_no, m.member_id as memberId, nvl(m.member_nickname, m.member_id) as memberNickname, o.bread_no, b.bread_name as breadName, o.order_count, o.total_price, o.order_status, o.order_date from order_tbl o join member_tbl m on o.member_no = m.member_no join bread_tbl b on o.bread_no = b.bread_no where o.order_status in ('CANCEL_REQUEST', 'CANCEL_COMPLETE', 'REFUND_COMPLETE') order by o.order_date desc

select o.order_no, o.member_no, m.member_id as memberId, nvl(m.member_nickname, m.member_id) as memberNickname, o.bread_no, b.bread_name as breadName, o.order_count, o.total_price, o.order_status, o.order_date from order_tbl o join member_tbl m on o.member_no = m.member_no join bread_tbl b on o.bread_no = b.bread_no where o.order_status = 'CANCEL_REQUEST' order by o.order_date desc

select o.order_no, o.member_no, m.member_id as memberId, nvl(m.member_nickname, m.member_id) as memberNickname, o.bread_no, b.bread_name as breadName, o.order_count, o.total_price, o.order_status, o.order_date from order_tbl o join member_tbl m on o.member_no = m.member_no join bread_tbl b on o.bread_no = b.bread_no where o.order_no = #{orderNo} and o.order_status = 'CANCEL_REQUEST'
select bread_no, bread_name, bread_price, bread_stock, bread_category, bread_status, bread_thumb from bread_tbl order by bread_no
